data.body: Finally got my hair cut after being like 3-4+ months overdue! I always feel so much better when my hair is short & freshly cut, my hair really makes a big impact on my dysphoria. The guy I go to is the shop owner, & he's not only a sweetheart, but also a big ally. It's so worth the higher price.
